wikitext:
{{Card Infobox|Maul||2|}}{{C|Maul||2}} is a 1 {{Icon|CE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} Card. It deals 5 (6 if upgraded) damage twice, then increases the damage of '''ALL''' {{C|Maul||2}} cards by 1 (2 if upgraded) for the remainder of combat.

== Obtaining Maul ==
Up to 6 of your cards can be {{2|Transform|Transformed}} into {{C|Maul||2}} upon taking {{R|Claws||2}} from {{KW|Tanx||2}}'s offering at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 3|Act 3]].
*{{2|Transform|Transforming}} upgraded cards will grant upgraded copies of {{C|Maul||2}}.
*{{2|Transform|Transforming}} {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}} cards will also grant copies of {{C|Maul||2}} with the same {{KW|Enchant|Enchantment|2}}(s), if {{C|Maul||2}} is eligible for the {{KW|Enchant|Enchantment|2}}.

== Notes ==
* This card is functionally similar to {{C|Claw||2}}, where it will increase the damage of all other copies of itself, except '''Maul''' starts with higher base damage, and increases damage by 1 less than {{C|Claw|2}}.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Maul to the game.
